---
title: "Swordfern Dieback Analyses"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Welcome

The purpose of this repository is to organize and share active research about the western sword fern dieback in the Puget Sound. 


## Disclaimer

Note these data are raw and the analyses are preliminary. Some of the sequence results or isolate identifications are still being fleshed out. Stay tuned for updates.


## Contact

Please contact Joey at hulbe@wsu.edu if you're interested in collaborating!
